headline: This Mall REIT Yields Over 4% And Is Up More Than 21% This Year, Wall Street Just Downgraded It Anyway
summary: Simon Property Group is delivering the kind of performance most REIT investors dream about, so why did Wall Street just pull its Buy rating? A refinancing headwind and a leadership transition raise real questions about whether the premium valuation can hold.
